content.speakerText: Boarding starts in 5 minutes — please wait near the gate.
content.speakerTextCn: 5分钟后开始登机，请在登机口附近等候。

options.text: I'll go to the restroom now.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Okay, I'll wait here.' 是对登机提示的恰当简短回应，表示理解和配合。其他选项均不符合语境：'I'll go to the restroom' 忽略指示，'Can I board early?' 是无礼追问，'Where is the gate?' 表明未听清关键信息，均不符合 'must_speak' 场景要求。

content.speakerText: We'll call priority passengers first — you're in group 3.
content.speakerTextCn: 优先乘客先登机，你是第3组。

options.text: I don't know what group I'm in.
How many people are in group 3?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Group 3? Got it!' 是确认信息的标准回应，简洁且符合礼貌规范。其他选项均不合适：'I don't know...' 表示没听清，不符合场景要求；'Can I switch...' 是不合理请求；'How many people...' 属于无关追问，违背 'must_speak' 中避免追问的原则。

content.speakerText: Please have your boarding pass and ID ready when your group is called.
content.speakerTextCn: 当您的组别被呼叫时，请准备好登机牌和身份证。

options.text: Can I use my phone instead?
What if I lose my boarding pass?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I'll get them ready now.' 表示积极准备，符合指令要求。其他选项均为无效或干扰性回应：'Can I use my phone...' 提出替代方案，不符合规定；'What if I lose...' 是提前假设问题，不合时宜；'Is group 3 next?' 属于无关追问，违背场景简洁回应原则。
